description: Spring Boot application*.yml templates for geostat config-gen (java-boot modules)
generatedHeader: # generated by geostat config-gen — do not edit

javaBoot.simpleApplicationYml:
server:
  port: ${{{port_env}:{port_default}}}

spring:
  application:
    name: {app_name}
  config:
    import: optional:classpath:application-custom.yml

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,prometheus,metrics
javaBoot.applicationYml:
server:
  port: ${{{port_env}:{port_default}}}

spring:
  application:
    name: {app_name}
  config:
    import: optional:classpath:application-custom.yml
  profiles:
    default: {default_profile}
    group:
{profile_groups_yaml}

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,prometheus,metrics
javaBoot.envProfileLocalYml:
spring:
  config:
    import: "optional:file:{env_import}[.properties]"
{secrets_block}
logging:
  level:
    org.springframework.ai: DEBUG
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client: DEBUG
javaBoot.envProfileDevYml:
spring:
  config:
    import: "optional:file:{env_import}[.properties]"
  devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-paths: /app/src/main/resources
    livereload:
      enabled: false
{secrets_block}
logging:
  level:
    org.springframework.ai: DEBUG
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client: DEBUG
javaBoot.envProfileProdYml:
spring:
  config:
    import: "optional:file:{env_import}[.properties]"
{secrets_block}
logging:
  file:
    path: /app/logs
  level:
    org.springframework.ai: WARN
    org.springframework.ai.chat.client: WARN
    root: WARN
    com.geostat.chat: INFO
    org.springframework: WARN
    org.hibernate: WARN
javaBoot.dbYml:
spring:
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: validate
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate:
        default_schema: {postgres_schema}
  flyway:
    enabled: true
    baseline-on-migrate: true
    schemas: {postgres_schema}
    default-schema: {postgres_schema}
    create-schemas: true
    locations: classpath:db/migration
{rabbitmq_hybrid_block}

management:
  health:
    db:
      enabled: true
    rabbit:
      enabled: ${{{events_enabled_env}:false}}
